CALM_STANCE.title: Calm
CALM_STANCE.description: When you exit this Stance, gain [blue]2[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
WRATH_STANCE.title: Wrath
WRATH_STANCE.description: Deal double damage. Take double damage.
DIVINITY_STANCE.title: Divinity
DIVINITY_STANCE.description: Deal triple damage. Gain [blue]3[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. Exit this Stance at the start of your next turn.
MARK_POWER.title: Mark
MARK_POWER.description: Whenever you play [blue]Pressure Points[/blue], lose [blue]X[/blue] HP.
MARK_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play [blue]Pressure Points[/blue], lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP.
MANTRA_POWER.title: Mantra
BATTLE_HYMN_POWER.title: Battle Hymn
BATTLE_HYMN_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]X[/blue] [blue]Smites[/blue] into your hand.
BATTLE_HYMN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Smites[/blue] into your hand.
COLLECT_POWER.title: Collect
COLLECT_POWER.description: At the start of your next [blue]X[/blue] turns, put a [blue]Miracle+[/blue] into your hand.
COLLECT_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, put a [blue]Miracle+[/blue] into your hand.
FASTING_POWER.title: Fasting
FASTING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]X[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Energy
FASTING_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} Energy
FORESIGHT_POWER.title: Foresight
FORESIGHT_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, [blue]Scry[/blue] [blue]X[/blue].
FORESIGHT_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, [blue]Scry[/blue] [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
LIKE_WATER_POWER.title: Like Water
LIKE_WATER_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, if you are [blue]Calm[/blue], gain [blue]X[/blue] [blue]Block[/blue]
LIKE_WATER_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, if you are [blue]Calm[/blue], gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Block[/blue]
MENTAL_FORTRESS_POWER.title: Mental Fortress
NIRVANA_POWER.title: Nirvana
RUSHDOWN_POWER.title: Rushdown
SIMMERING_RAGE_POWER.title: Simmering Rage
SIMMERING_RAGE_POWER.description: Enter [blue]Wrath[/blue] at the start of the turn
STUDY_POWER.title: Study
STUDY_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, shuffle [blue]X[/blue] [blue]Insights[/blue] into your draw pile.
STUDY_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, shuffle [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Insights[/blue] into your draw pile.
BLOCK_RETURN_POWER.title: Block Return
WAVE_OF_THE_HAND_POWER.title: Wave of the Hand
WAVE_OF_THE_HAND_POWER.description: Whenever you gain [blue]Block[/blue], apply [blue]X[/blue] [blue]Weak[/blue] to ALL enemies.
WAVE_OF_THE_HAND_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you gain [blue]Block[/blue], apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Weak[/blue] to ALL enemies.
OMEGA_POWER.title: Omega
OMEGA_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]X[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
OMEGA_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
BLASPHEMER_POWER.title: Blasphemer
BLASPHEMER_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, die.
DEVA_POWER.title: Deva
DEVA_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} X times and increase this gain by Y.
DEVA_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} [blue]{Energy:diff()}[/blue] times and increase this gain by {Amount}.
DEVOTION_POWER.title: Devotion
DEVOTION_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]X[/blue] [blue]Mantra[/blue].
DEVOTION_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [blue]Mantra[/blue].
ESTABLISHMENT_POWER.title: Establishment
ESTABLISHMENT_POWER.description: Whenever a card is [blue]Retained[/blue], lower its cost by X.
ESTABLISHMENT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever a card is [blue]Retained[/blue], lower its cost by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
MASTER_REALITY_POWER.title: Master Reality
MASTER_REALITY_POWER.description: Whenever a card is created, it is [blue]Upgraded[/blue],
DUALITY_POWER.title: Duality
